zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead於1578年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede18歲，母親Elizabeth Banks19歲。她和Samuel Cutter至少有1個女兒。她去世於1664年1月10日在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可坎布利其享年86歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Leatherhead
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Leatherhead (Surrey), which is Ledred in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Wilkerson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkinson
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead was born in 1578, in Northumberland, England, her father, Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede, was 18 and her mother, Elizabeth Banks, was 19. She had at least 1 daughter with Samuel Cutter. She died on 10 January 1664, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 86, and was buried in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead est née en 1578, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Banks, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Samuel Cutter. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1664, à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead 1578 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede 18 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Banks 19. Sie hatte mit Samuel Cutter mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1664 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead è nata il nel 1578 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Banks, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Samuel Cutter. Morì il 10 gennaio 1664, nel Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherheadが1578年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Leatherhead Ledredeは18歳，母Elizabeth Banksは19歳であった。彼女はSamuel Cutterとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1664年1月10日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスカンブリッジで86歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Uni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead(이)가 1578년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Banks(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Samuel Cutter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 1월 10일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead nasceu em 1578, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Banks, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Samuel Cutter. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1664, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead родилась в 1578 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Banks, 19. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Samuel Cutter. Она умерла 10 января 1664 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Wilkerson Leatherhead nació en 1578, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Banks, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Samuel Cutter. Murió el 10 de enero de 1664, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
